शहरी उप-जिलों को वर्ष 2021 के दौरान चार या अधिक प्रसवपूर्व देखभाल जांच प्राप्त करने वाली गर्भवती महिलाओं की कुल संख्या के आधार पर रैंक करें, सबसे अधिक से शुरू करते हुए।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.sub_district_name, 
    SUM(fmar.pw_received_4_or_more_anc_checkups) AS total_pregnant_women
FROM 
    fact_maternal_anc_registration fmar
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district ds ON fmar.sub_district_id = ds.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_month dm ON fmar.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE 
    ds.type_of_area = 'Urban' AND dy.year_value = '2021'
GROUP BY 
    ds.sub_district_name
ORDER BY 
    total_pregnant_women DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.sub_district_name, 
    SUM(fmar.pw_received_4_or_more_anc_checkups) AS total_pregnant_women
FROM 
    fact_maternal_anc_registration fmar
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district ds ON fmar.sub_district_id = ds.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_month dm ON fmar.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE 
    ds.type_of_area = 'Urban' AND dy.year_value = '2021'
GROUP BY 
    ds.sub_district_name
ORDER BY 
    total_pregnant_women DESC;

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
उन उप-जिलों और उनके क्षेत्र प्रकारों की पहचान करें जहां वर्ष 2021 के दौरान पहली तिमाही में पांच से अधिक प्रसवपूर्व देखभाल पंजीकरण दर्ज किए गए थे।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.ANC_REGISTERED_WITHIN_1ST_TRIMESTER) > 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT ds.sub_district_id, ds.type_of_area 
FROM fact_maternal_anc_registration fm 
JOIN dim_sub_district ds ON fm.sub_district_id = ds.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_month dm ON fm.month_id = dm.month_id 
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id 
WHERE dy.year_value = '2021' AND fm.anc_registered_within_1st_trimester > 5;

FROM fact_maternal_anc_registration fm

JOIN dim_month dm ON fm.month_id = dm.month_id 
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
2021 में हीमोग्लोबिन स्तर 11 से नीचे दर्ज गर्भवती महिलाओं की सर्वाधिक संख्या वाले शीर्ष 5 ग्रामीण उप-जिलों की पहचान करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT T1.sub_district_name, T2.pw_hb_less_than_11 
FROM dim_sub_district AS T1 
JOIN fact_maternal_health_testing AS T2 
ON T1.sub_district_id = T2.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_month AS T3 
ON T2.month_id = T3.month_id 
JOIN dim_year AS T4 
ON T3.year_id = T4.year_id 
WHERE T4.year_value = 2021 AND T1.type_of_area = 'Rural' 
ORDER BY T2.pw_hb_less_than_11 DESC 
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT T1.sub_district_name, T2.pw_hb_less_than_11 
FROM dim_sub_district AS T1 
JOIN fact_maternal_health_testing AS T2 
ON T1.sub_district_id = T2.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_month AS T3 
ON T2.month_id = T3.month_id 
JOIN dim_year AS T4 
ON T3.year_id = T4.year_id 
WHERE T4.year_value = 2021 AND T1.type_of_area = 'Rural' 
ORDER BY T2.pw_hb_less_than_11 DESC 
LIMIT 5;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 5. Pred count: 5.

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
उप-जिलों और उनके क्षेत्र प्रकारों का विवरण प्रदान करें, जो पहले वर्ष के लिए हीमोग्लोबिन स्तर 11 से कम वाली गर्भवती महिलाओं की कुल संख्या दर्शाते हों, केवल उन्हीं रिकॉर्ड्स पर ध्यान केंद्रित करें जहाँ संख्या 38 से कम है और परिणामों को उच्चतम से निम्नतम के क्रम में रैंक करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID WHERE T3.YEAR_ID = 1 AND T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 < 38.0000000000000000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name, dim_sub_district.type_of_area, SUM(fact_maternal_health_testing.pw_hb_less_than_11) AS total_pregnant_women 
FROM fact_maternal_health_testing 
JOIN dim_sub_district ON fact_maternal_health_testing.sub_district_id = dim_sub_district.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_month ON fact_maternal_health_testing.month_id = dim_month.month_id 
JOIN dim_year ON dim_month.year_id = dim_year.year_id 
WHERE dim_year.year_value = '2020' 
GROUP BY dim_sub_district.sub_district_name, dim_sub_district.type_of_area 
HAVING SUM(fact_maternal_health_testing.pw_hb_less_than_11) < 38 
ORDER BY total_pregnant_women DESC;

FROM fact_maternal_health_testing 
JOIN dim_sub_district ON fact_maternal_health_testing.sub_district_id = dim_sub_district.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_month ON fact_maternal_health_testing.month_id = dim_month.month_id 
JOIN dim_year ON dim_month.year_id = dim_year.year_id 
WHERE dim_year.year_value = '2020' 
GROUP BY dim_sub_district.sub_district_name, dim_sub_district.type_of_area 
HAVING SUM(fact_maternal_health_testing.pw_hb_less_than_11) < 38 
ORDER BY total_pregnant_women DESC;

question:

question: वर्ष 2021 के लिए, क्षेत्र प्रकार के अनुसार एक विवरण प्रदान करें जो हीमोग्लोबिन स्तर 11 से कम वाली गर्भवती महिलाओं की कुल संख्या और किए गए हीमोग्लोबिन परीक्षणों की औसत संख्या दर्शाता हो।
gold_sql: SELECT T2.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T1.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11), AVG(T1.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) FROM FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T1.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T2.TYPE_OF_AREA
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA, 
    SUM(mht.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) AS total_pregnant_women_with_hb_less_than_11, 
    AVG(mht.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) AS average_haemoglobin_tests_conducted
FROM 
    FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mht
JOIN 
    DIM_SUB_DISTRICT ds ON mht.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = ds.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_MONTH dm ON mht.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID
WHERE 
    dy.YEAR_VALUE = '2021'
GROUP BY 
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA, 
    SUM(mht.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) AS total_pregnant_women_with_hb_less_than_11, 
    AVG(mht.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) AS average_haemoglobin_tests_conducted
FROM 
    FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING mht
JOIN 
    DIM_SUB_DISTRICT ds ON mht.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = ds.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_MONTH dm ON mht.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID
WHERE 
    dy.YEAR_VALUE = '2021'
GROUP BY 
    ds.TYPE_OF_AREA;

JOIN dim_year y2022 ON m2022.year_id = y2022.year_id

question: 2021 में मौखिक गोली चक्रों और वितरित कंडोमों का विवरण प्रदान करें, क्षेत्र प्रकार के अनुसार, सक्रिय वितरण वाले क्षेत्रों में गोली वितरण की मात्रा के आधार पर क्रमबद्ध।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED), SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.type_of_area, 
    SUM(fp.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed) AS total_pill_distribution, 
    SUM(fp.condom_pieces_distributed) AS total_condom_distribution
FROM 
    fact_family_planning fp
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district ds ON fp.sub_district_id = ds.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_month m ON fp.month_id = m.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
WHERE 
    y.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY 
    ds.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    total_pill_distribution DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    ds.type_of_area, 
    SUM(fp.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed) AS total_pill_distribution, 
    SUM(fp.condom_pieces_distributed) AS total_condom_distribution
FROM 
    fact_family_planning fp
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district ds ON fp.sub_district_id = ds.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_month m ON fp.month_id = m.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
WHERE 
    y.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY 
    ds.type_of_area
ORDER BY 
    total_pill_distribution DESC;

2021 में कौन से पांच ग्रामीण उप-जिलों में 10 वर्ष से अधिक आयु के बच्चों को टीकाकरण प्राप्त करने की सबसे अधिक संख्या थी?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_10_YEARS_TT10_TD10) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql: SELECT t1.sub_district_name FROM dim_sub_district t1 INNER JOIN fact_child_immunization_adolescent t2 ON t1.sub_district_id = t2.sub_district_id INNER JOIN dim_month t3 ON t2.month_id = t3.month_id INNER JOIN dim_year t4 ON t3.year_id = t4.year_id WHERE t1.type_of_area = 'Rural' AND t4.year_value = '2021' ORDER BY t2.children_more_than_10_years_tt10_td10 DESC LIMIT 5;
raw_output: SELECT t1.sub_district_name FROM dim_sub_district t1 INNER JOIN fact_child_immunization_adolescent t2 ON t1.sub_district_id = t2.sub_district_id INNER JOIN dim_month t3 ON t2.month_id = t3.month_id INNER JOIN dim_year t4 ON t3.year_id = t4.year_id WHERE t1.type_of_area = 'Rural' AND t4.year_value = '2021' ORDER BY t2.children_more_than_10_years_tt10_td10 DESC LIMIT 5;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 5. Pred count: 5.

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
2021 में कंडोम वितरित करने वाले उप-जिलों और उनके क्षेत्र प्रकारों की एक रैंक की गई सूची प्रदान करें, जो प्रत्येक के लिए प्रदान की गई कुल मात्रा दर्शाती हो।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.TYPE_OF_AREA HAVING SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dsub.sub_district_name, dsub.type_of_area, SUM(ffp.condom_pieces_distributed) AS total_condom_distributed
FROM fact_family_planning ffp
JOIN dim_sub_district dsub ON ffp.sub_district_id = dsub.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm ON ffp.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dy.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY dsub.sub_district_name, dsub.type_of_area
ORDER BY total_condom_distributed DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT dsub.sub_district_name, dsub.type_of_area, SUM(ffp.condom_pieces_distributed) AS total_condom_distributed
FROM fact_family_planning ffp
JOIN dim_sub_district dsub ON ffp.sub_district_id = dsub.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm ON ffp.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dy.year_value = 2021
GROUP BY dsub.sub_district_name, dsub.type_of_area
ORDER BY total_condom_distributed DESC;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 4197. Pred count: 6509.

question: वर्ष 2021 के लिए, उन क्षेत्रों के लिए विशेष रूप से, जहां कम हीमोग्लोबिन के मामलों की संख्या 38 से कम है, हीमोग्लोबिन स्तर 11 से नीचे वाली गर्भवती महिलाओं की कुल संख्या और किए गए हीमोग्लोबिन परीक्षणों की औसत संख्या का क्षेत्र प्रकार के अनुसार विवरण प्रदान करें, कुल मामलों के अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11), AVG(T2.HAEMOGLOBIN_TESTS_CONDUCTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_HEALTH_TESTING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11 < 38.0000000000000000 AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY SUM(T2.PW_HB_LESS_THAN_11) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    ds.type_of_area, 
    SUM(mt.pw_hb_less_than_11) AS total_pregnant_women_with_low_hb, 
    AVG(mt.haemoglobin_tests_conducted) AS average_haemoglobin_tests
FROM 
    fact_maternal_health_testing mt
JOIN 
    dim_sub_district ds ON mt.sub_district_id = ds.sub_district_id
JOIN 
    dim_month m ON mt.month_id = m.month_id
JOIN 
    dim_year y ON m.year_id = y.year_id
WHERE 
    y.year_value = '2021' AND mt.pw_hb_less_than_11

SELECT 
    ds.type_of_area,

question: कुल मौखिक गोली चक्र और 2021 में वितरित कंडोम का विवरण प्रदान करें, क्षेत्र के प्रकार के अनुसार वर्गीकृत किया गया।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA, SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED), SUM(T2.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA ORDER BY T1.TYPE_OF_AREA
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dsd.TYPE_OF_AREA, 
    SUM(fp.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) AS total_oral_pill_cycles, 
    SUM(fp.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) AS total_condoms_distributed
FROM 
    FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING fp
JOIN 
    DIM_SUB_DISTRICT dsd ON fp.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = dsd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_MONTH dm ON fp.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID
WHERE 
    dy.YEAR_VALUE = '2021'
GROUP BY 
    dsd.TYPE_OF_AREA
ORDER BY 
    dsd.TYPE_OF_AREA;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dsd.TYPE_OF_AREA, 
    SUM(fp.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) AS total_oral_pill_cycles, 
    SUM(fp.CONDOM_PIECES_DISTRIBUTED) AS total_condoms_distributed
FROM 
    FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING fp
JOIN 
    DIM_SUB_DISTRICT dsd ON fp.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = dsd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_MONTH dm ON fp.MONTH_ID = dm.MONTH_ID
JOIN 
    DIM_YEAR dy ON dm.YEAR_ID = dy.YEAR_ID
WHERE 
    dy.YEAR_VALUE = '2021'
GROUP BY 
    dsd.TYPE_OF_AREA
ORDER BY 
    dsd.TYPE_OF_AREA;

question:
इस प्रश्न का अनुवाद करें:
शहरी उप-जिलों को वर्ष 2021 के दौरान चार या अधिक प्रसवपूर्व जांच प्राप्त करने वाली गर्भवती महिलाओं की कुल संख्या के आधार पर रैंक करें, सबसे अधिक संख्या से शुरू करते हुए।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MATERNAL_ANC_REGISTRATION AS T3 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T2.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Urban' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T3.MONTH_ID = T2.MONTH_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.PW_RECEIVED_4_OR_MORE_ANC_CHECKUPS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name, SUM(fact_maternal_anc_registration.pw_received_4_or_more_anc_checkups) AS total_pregnant_women 
FROM fact_maternal_anc_registration 
JOIN dim_sub_district ON fact_maternal_anc_registration.sub_district_id = dim_sub_district.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_month ON fact_maternal_anc_registration.month_id = dim_month.month_id 
JOIN dim_year ON dim_month.year_id = dim_year.year_id 
WHERE dim_year.year_value = '2021' AND dim_sub_district.type_of_area ILIKE 'urban' 
GROUP BY dim_sub_district.sub_district_name 
ORDER BY total_pregnant_women DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name, SUM(fact_maternal_anc_registration.pw_received_4_or_more_anc_checkups) AS total_pregnant_women 
FROM fact_maternal_anc_registration 
JOIN dim_sub_district ON fact_maternal_anc_registration.sub_district_id = dim_sub_district.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_month ON fact_maternal_anc_registration.month_id = dim_month.month_id 
JOIN dim_year ON dim_month.year_id = dim_year.year_id 
WHERE dim_year.year_value = '2021' AND dim_sub_district.type_of_area ILIKE 'urban' 
GROUP BY dim_sub_district.sub_district_name 
ORDER BY total_pregnant_women DESC;

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
उन उप-जिलों की पहचान करें जिन्होंने 2021 में शहरी और ग्रामीण दोनों क्षेत्रों में कम से कम एक बच्चे को दूसरा डीपीटी बूस्टर (5 वर्ष की आयु के बाद) प्राप्त करने की सूचना दी, वर्णानुक्रम में सूचीबद्ध।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ADOLESCENT AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' AND T2.CHILDREN_MORE_THAN_5_YEARS_DPT_5_2ND_BOOSTER > 0 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.TYPE_OF_AREA) = 2 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name FROM dim_sub_district 
JOIN fact_child_immunization_adolescent ON dim_sub_district.sub_district_id = fact_child_immunization_adolescent.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_month ON fact_child_immunization_adolescent.month_id = dim_month.month_id 
JOIN dim_year ON dim_month.year_id = dim_year.year_id 
WHERE dim_year.year_value = '2021' AND fact_child_immunization_adolescent.children_more_than_5_years_dpt_5_2nd_booster > 0 
AND dim_sub_district.type_of_area ILIKE 'urban' OR dim_sub_district.type_of_area ILIKE 'rural'
GROUP BY dim_sub_district.sub_district_name 
ORDER BY dim_sub_district.sub_district_name ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_sub_district.sub_district_name FROM dim_sub_district 
JOIN fact_child_immunization_adolescent ON dim_sub_district.sub_district_id = fact_child_immunization_adolescent.sub_district_id 
JOIN dim_month ON fact_child_immunization_adolescent.month_id = dim_month.month_id 
JOIN dim_year ON dim_month.year_id = dim_year.year_id 
WHERE dim_year.year_value = '2021' AND fact_child_immunization_adolescent.children_more_than_5_years_dpt_5_2nd_booster > 0 
AND dim_sub_district.type_of_area ILIKE 'urban' OR dim_sub_district.type_of_area ILIKE 'rural'
GROUP BY dim_sub_district.sub_district_name 
ORDER BY dim_sub_district.sub_district_name ASC;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 671. Pred count: 5426.

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
वर्ष 2021 में संयुक्त मौखिक गोली चक्रों की सर्वाधिक कुल संख्या वितरित करने वाले शीर्ष 5 ग्रामीण उप-जिलों की पहचान करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) FROM DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN FACT_FAMILY_PLANNING AS T2 ON T1.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_MONTH AS T3 ON T2.MONTH_ID = T3.MONTH_ID JOIN DIM_YEAR AS T4 ON T3.YEAR_ID = T4.YEAR_ID WHERE T1.TYPE_OF_AREA = 'Rural' AND T4.YEAR_VALUE = '2021' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.COMBINED_ORAL_PILL_CYCLES_DISTRIBUTED) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dsd.sub_district_name, SUM(fp.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed) AS total_cop_cycles_distributed
FROM fact_family_planning fp
JOIN dim_sub_district dsd ON fp.sub_district_id = dsd.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm ON fp.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dy.year_value = '2021' AND dsd.type_of_area = 'Rural'
GROUP BY dsd.sub_district_name
ORDER BY total_cop_cycles_distributed DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT dsd.sub_district_name, SUM(fp.combined_oral_pill_cycles_distributed) AS total_cop_cycles_distributed
FROM fact_family_planning fp
JOIN dim_sub_district dsd ON fp.sub_district_id = dsd.sub_district_id
JOIN dim_month dm ON fp.month_id = dm.month_id
JOIN dim_year dy ON dm.year_id = dy.year_id
WHERE dy.year_value = '2021' AND dsd.type_of_area = 'Rural'
GROUP BY dsd.sub_district_name
ORDER BY total_cop_cycles_distributed DESC
LIMIT 5;
